title: AI ROI in 2026: Measuring Value Beyond Proof of Concept
summary: Enterprise AI investment is accelerating in 2026. Budgets are expanding. Expectations are rising. Boards are asking sharper questions. But one question now sits at the center of every AI discussion: What measurable business value is this delivering? For many organizations, the AI journey started with promising pilots.
